requiredCorrections.note: Make the largest, most prominent text a compelling candidate-facing hook (e.g., 'UAE HOSPITAL GROUP EXPANSION — ALL DEPARTMENTS HIRING') with immediate clarity on the job/project and location.
Redistribute elements to better use the right side of the canvas—avoid large empty space; balance list and image areas so the text does not feel crowded.
Strengthen the visual prominence of the contact section—make phone/email larger, more urgent, or paired with a callout shape or bolder font.
Increase the opacity of the scrim or strengthen text contrast in areas where the background softens legibility.
Correct the spelling of 'Ralling at Online' to 'Online Interview' or another standard term.
Integrate the QR code more implicitly into the design, perhaps in the contact/CTA zone.
